        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Condo property listings with type=condo, price, size_sqft, bedrooms, bathrooms, condo_fees_monthly, property_taxes_annual, building_age, location_neighborhood and region', 'Property availability status', 'Open-concept layout mapped to layout_type=open_concept', 'Virtual or in-person viewing availability mapped to viewing_coordination.viewing_type', 'Request to confirm viewing availability mapped to contact_coordination.next_action_required=schedule_viewing', 'Financing options with purchase_method=mortgage, interest_rate, down_payment_required, mortgage_term_years', 'Financing program type (government-backed) mapped to purchase_method=seller_financing or mortgage', 'Legal service packages with service_type=legal, cost, service_level=basic/standard/premium, cancellation_policy, refund_policy', 'Moving services with moving_service_level=standard, cost, duration_days=1, packing_included=yes', 'Utility setup package with utility_package_type=basic, services_included=[electricity, water, gas], cost', 'Internet installation mapped to utility_services.services_included=internet', 'Timeline coordination for post-closing scheduling within 1–2 weeks mapped to timeline_coordination.completion_window', 'Combined package summary (property, financing, legal, and setup) mapped to total_package_summary fields', 'Follow-up offer to prepare package summary mapped to contact_coordination.next_action_required=confirm_services']"
    }
}

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
